resources.string: MT Auto Clicker uses Accessibility to perform taps, gestures, and system navigation (Back / Home / Recents) for macros you record. It only acts where you place targets or where your macro steps say — it does not read passwords or personal data.
Allow MT Auto Clicker to show the floating control bar while you automate other apps.
Enable MT Auto Clicker under Accessibility so it can perform clicks at your chosen screen positions.
